senses.gloss: awqiyyah (ounce), a unit of weight in Egypt: 37 grams (one twelfth ratl)
a unit of weight in Aleppo: 320 grams
a unit of weight in Beirut: 213.39 grams
a unit of weight in Jerusalem: 240 grams
a unit of weight in Morocco: approximately 62.5 grams
a unit of weight in Malta: approximately 26.46 grams
ouguiya (currency of Mauritania) (only in this form, not وُقِيَّة (wuqiyya))
ounce (just the same as the English or even to translate it)

etymology.text: Probably through Classical Syriac ܐܘܢܩܝܐ (ʾūnqīyā) from Ancient Greek οὐγγία (oungía), οὐγκία (ounkía), from Latin uncia (“ounce, twelfth part”), from ūnus (“one”).
